gate_manifest.scope: long-span bundle decision gate; no new seed enumeration is performed
rules: long-span sweeps require the search frontier to be open
strict raw-suffix economics require observed held-out prefixes at or beyond the raw-suffix break-even threshold
short-hit bundle wins must survive comparable control-density checks
sidecar and residual-vector claims require ordinary held-out negative groups with null controls
public dictionary signals do not justify long-span raw-depth sweeps while harder replication controls fail

summary.stop_rule: Do not run broad long-span bundle sweeps until search frontier, raw-suffix break-even, selected-span, and control gates pass.
summary.conclusion: Current evidence blocks broad long-span bundle sweeps.

gate_checks.requirement: Search frontier allows broad raw depth before long-span sweeps.
gate_checks.consequence: Do not run long-span raw-depth sweeps while the frontier gate is closed.

gate_checks.requirement: Best non-planted exact-hit forecast is below 1 GiB.
gate_checks.consequence: Long-span search is not compute-rational from the current forecast.

gate_checks.requirement: At least one profitable selected span exists in recent discovery artifacts.
gate_checks.consequence: Do not optimize long-span bundle packing before profitable spans exist.

gate_checks.requirement: Observed held-out forced prefixes reach strict raw-suffix break-even.
gate_checks.consequence: Prefix-4 movement remains steering evidence, not long-span bundle evidence.

gate_checks.requirement: Short-hit bundling has ordinary wins with no comparable controls.
gate_checks.observed: 3 ordinary groups, 1 control groups, control density comparable True
gate_checks.consequence: Current exact short-hit density is too control-like to justify broad long-span work.

gate_checks.requirement: Whole-stream residual vectors produce ordinary negative groups with null controls.
gate_checks.consequence: Residual-vector evidence does not yet support long-span bundle promotion.

gate_checks.requirement: Seed-table/public dictionary evidence survives harder held-out controls.
gate_checks.observed: seed-table ordinary groups 0; schema replication controls 2; claim control_failed_on_frozen_expansion_corpora
gate_checks.consequence: Public dictionary signals stay research-only until replication controls pass.

gate_checks.requirement: Packed sidecar replication produces full-stream negative ordinary groups.
gate_checks.consequence: Descriptor packing remains narrow and does not justify broad long-span bundle sweeps.
